soccer.clue: game played by two teams of eleven players using a round ball

tennis.clue: game played with rackets and a yellow ball over a net

golf.clue: game played on a large outdoor course with clubs and a small white ball

rugby.clue: team game played with an oval ball that may be kicked or carried

baseball.clue: game played with a bat, ball, and gloves on a diamond-shaped field

hockey.clue: game played on ice or a field with curved sticks and a puck or ball

boxing.clue: sport of fighting with the fists

surfing.clue: sport of riding on the crest of a wave on a board

basketball.clue: game played between two teams of five players who try to throw a ball through a hoop

volleyball.clue: game in which two teams use their hands to hit a ball over a high net

football.clue: game played with an oval ball on a field with goalposts

skiing.clue: action of traveling over snow on long runners

swimming.clue: sport or activity of propelling oneself through water

cricket.clue: game played with a bat and ball between two teams of eleven players on a field with a wicket

gymnastics.clue: exercises involving physical agility and coordination

cycling.clue: sport or activity of riding a bicycle

badminton.clue: game played with rackets and a shuttlecock over a net

bowling.clue: game in which a heavy ball is rolled down a lane to knock down pins

archery.clue: sport or skill of shooting with a bow and arrows

judo.clue: Japanese martial art focused on throwing and grappling

karate.clue: Japanese martial art focused on striking with hands and feet

taekwondo.clue: Korean martial art focused on kicking

wrestling.clue: sport of grappling and hand-to-hand combat

rowing.clue: sport of propelling a boat with oars

sailing.clue: sport or activity of using boats with sails

kayaking.clue: sport of using a small, narrow boat propelled by a double-bladed paddle

canoeing.clue: sport of using a lightweight narrow boat propelled by a single-bladed paddle

athletics.clue: collection of sporting events that involve competitive running, jumping, and throwing

diving.clue: sport of jumping or falling into water from a platform or springboard

handball.clue: game in which two teams use their hands to pass a ball and throw it into a goal

squash.clue: game played with rackets and a small rubber ball in a four-walled court

lacrosse.clue: team game played with a stick with a net pocket for carrying the ball

softball.clue: game similar to baseball but played with a larger ball

curling.clue: sport in which players slide stones on a sheet of ice toward a target area

snowboarding.clue: sport of sliding down a snow-covered slope on a single board

bobsleigh.clue: winter sport in which teams make timed runs down narrow, twisting, banked, iced tracks in a gravity-powered sled

luge.clue: winter sport in which a person or team slides down an ice track on a small sled

skeleton.clue: winter sport in which a person slides down an ice track head-first on a small sled

biathlon.clue: winter sport that combines cross-country skiing and rifle shooting

triathlon.clue: athletic contest consisting of three different events, typically swimming, cycling, and running

marathon.clue: long-distance running race, strictly one of 26 miles and 385 yards

weightlifting.clue: sport or activity of lifting heavy weights

gym.clue: physical exercises and activities performed in a gym

yoga.clue: Hindu spiritual and ascetic discipline focused on health and relaxation

pilates.clue: system of repetitive exercises performed on a mat or other equipment

dance.clue: performing a series of steps and movements to music

hiking.clue: activity of going for long walks, especially in the country or woods

skating.clue: action or sport of gliding on skates
